Author: UnknownX
Name: ReAction
Description: Improves aspects of the battle system with action stacks (like MOAction) and various QoL settings.
Changelog: Added a blacklist for turbo hotbar keybinds

Author: UnknownX
Name: NoClippy
Punchline: Reduces the effects of lag on certain aspects of the game, and can show GCD clips
Description: Reduces the effects of lag on certain aspects of the game, such as weaving and statuses. Usable as an alternative, or in addition, to XivAlexander.

Author: LeonBlade
Name: Burning Down the House
Description: 根据坐标移动装修物品，解除游戏限制。

Author: akira0245, Ori, Kalle, Zune
Name: MidiBard 2
Description:
Bard performance using midi files or keyboard.
- Solo and ensemble mode support
- Text commands for instrument equip and switch
Supported by FFXIV Bards & Bands Community: ffbard.com
Punchline:
Bard performance using midi files or keyboard.
Supported by FFXIV Bards & Bands Community: ffbard.com
Changelog: 1. Better support on Bard MIDI Library: Show Playlist Menu(Triple dots on top right) -> BML Browser; 2. Rename Electric Guitar Modes and adding help messages. 3. Loads of fixes and QOL changes! 4. 更新部分加入中文翻譯 Please join our Discord for details: ffbard.com

Author: Taurenkey, NightmareXIV, croizat
Name: Pandora's Box
Punchline: Do you dare to open Pandora's Box?
Description:
Pandora's Box is a collection of major QoL tweaks and adjustments.

Open the box with /pandora
Changelog:
- Update open all coffers to work when inventory is hidden (such as with inventory replacement plugins).
- Fix Pandora Gathering UI.

Author: daemitus, kawaii
Name: Yes Already
Punchline: Clicks Yes in various dialogs you've specified.
Description: Tired of clicking yes in Praetorium? Can't stand using keys in dungeons? Well do I have the plugin for you! Yes Already is specifically designed to click all the annoying dialogs you've grown accustomed facerolling. Just enter the dialog text, and you'll never see it again! Also works with /regex/ and has several built-in modules for dialogs that aren't quite yes/no prompts but act like it (like desynth).

Author: Det, Taurenkey
Name: AutoHook
Description: It hooks the fish for you, can you believe it?

Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: HaselTweaks
Description:
There is a lot of tweaks with a bunch of options.
For a detailed description please visit the plugins repository or open /haseltweaks when installed.

- Achievement Link Tooltip
- Aether Current Helper
- Always Face Camera
- Auto Sorter
- Auto-open Recipe
- Auto-select Soil and Seed
- Background Music Keybind
- Bigger Character Previews
- Armoire Quick Store
- Cast Bar Aetheryte Names
- Character Class Switcher
- Character Reputation Teleport
- Commands
    - /itemlink [id]
    - /whatmount
    - /whatemote
    - /whatbarding
    - /glamourplate [id]
- Companion Color Preview
- Cosmic Research in Duty List
- Custom Chat Message Formats
- Custom Chat Timestamp
- DTR
    - Busy status
    - FPS
    - Instance number
- Disable Reward Popups
- Enhanced Crafting Log
    - Remember search history
- Enhanced Experience Bar
    - Companion Bar
    - Island Sanctuary Bar
    - PvP Series Bar 
- Enhanced Fitting Room
    - Keep Facewear on
- Enhanced Glamour Dresser
    - Automatically select missing items from the inventory when opening the Outfit Glamour Creation
- Enhanced Hunting Log
    - Remember last selected class
    - Automatically select the current class
    - Automatically set the filter to "Show Incomplete"
- Enhanced Isleworks Agenda
    - Search Bar
    - Disable item tooltips in the list
- Enhanced Login/Logout
    - Skip Logo
    - Show pets in character selection
    - Play emote in character selection
    - Preload territory when queued
    - Clear tell history on logout
- Enhanced Material List
    - Zone names of where to find the material
    - Click to open the map of where to find the material
    - Auto-refresh Material List/Recipe Tree
    - Restore Material List on Login
    - "Search for Item by Crafting Method" context menu entry
- Enhanced Target Info
    - Mounted status
    - Fashion Accessory status
    - Remove leading zero in HP under 10%
- Expert Deliveries
- Faster Decompression
- Fast Mouse Click Fix
- Flash Taskbar
    - Flash on alarm
    - Flash on combat
    - Flash on synthesis completion
- Fix Inventory Open Tab
- Forced Cutscene Sounds
- Gear Set Grid
- Glamour Dresser Alert
- Glamour Dresser Keyboard Navigation
- Hide MSQ Complete
- Inventory Highlight
- Keep Screen Awake
- Lock Window Position
- Market Board Item Preview
- Material Allocation
- Minimap Adjustments
    - Square Collision (for custom minimap mask textures)
    - Default Opacity
    - Hover Opacity
    - Hide Coordinates
    - Hide Weather
    - Hide Time Indicator
    - Hide Cardinal Directions
- Portrait Helper
    - Fine-grained controls for editing portraits
    - Import/Export preset codes
    - Load/Save presets
    - Alignment Tool
- Prevent Reel-In from Movement
- Reveal Duty Requirements
- Safer Market Board Price Check
- Scrollable Tabs
- Search the markets
- Shop Item Icons
- Simple Aethernet List
Punchline: A collection of quality of life tweaks.
Changelog:
HaselTweaks

- Updated description for the Plugin Installer. It just lists all the tweaks now.

New Tweak: Character Reputation Teleport

Clicking an Allied Society in the Character window teleports you to the nearest Aetheryte instead of opening the map. Hold Shift to open the map normally.

Enhanced Login/Logout

- Changed/Fixed?: To prevent that the character is spawning with a T-Pose, the emote now plays once the character is visible.

Author: Anna
Changelog:
- Slightly redesign the manager tab
- Add ability to search for already-installed mods on Heliosphere and convert them
- Add IPC event for mod conversions
- Update dependencies
Description:
Heliosphere is a mod manager and platform designed to work directly with
Penumbra. It enables efficient downloads and fast installs to let you get back
to the fun part of mods: using them.

Heliosphere supports:
- Direct install to Penumbra
- Compressed and deduplicated (read: small) downloads
- Automatic updates (optional)
- Version history
- Mod changelogs
- Pictures in Penumbra
- And more

Give Heliosphere a try, and see if you can't say goodbye to any old mod
platform you were using before.
Name: Heliosphere
Punchline: An efficient mod manager and platform that integrates directly with Penumbra.
TestingChangelog:
- Fix a possible error in the multiple directory warning
- Fix updates for mods with duplicated files
- Add a first-time-user setup window to make onboarding easier

Author: Attick, daemitus, maintained by Khayle
Name: XIV Combo
Description: This plugin condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button. /pcombo to open menu
